_description: European Defence Tech Knowledge Graph — Event Stream (raw intelligence)
_instructions: This file is the raw intelligence feed. Scraping agents ONLY write here — never to master files.
Records are NEVER deleted or overwritten — only appended.
Each event has a shared envelope (same for all types) and a typed payload (specific to event type).
The confidence_score here is computed by the validation agent from four raw signals.
status field tracks the event through the pipeline — from unreviewed to promoted or rejected.
When the same event is reported by multiple sources, create one row per source — the deduplication agent merges them.

_confidence_model.description: Confidence score = weighted sum of four normalised signals. Recomputed on each validation agent run.

source_quality_scale.1.0: Company press release or official regulatory filing
source_quality_scale.0.85: Company social media or blog post
source_quality_scale.0.70: Tier-1 outlet: FT, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, Sifted, Reuters
source_quality_scale.0.50: Tier-2 outlet: EU-Startups, regional press, specialist publications

consistency_scale.1.00: All sources agree on all key figures
consistency_scale.0.80: Minor variance only — e.g. FX rounding, date precision
consistency_scale.0.20: Majority of sources conflict on key figures

_confidence_model.note: Weights are stored here so validation agent always reads current values. Update weights here to recalculate all scores on next agent run.

fundraise.round_type: enum: pre_seed | seed | series_a | series_b | series_c | series_d | growth | convertible | secondary
fundraise.lead_investor_names: array of strings as reported — agent does not resolve to IDs

contract_awarded.awarding_body: string — name of government, ministry, or agency
contract_awarded.classified: boolean — true if terms are classified

key_hire.person_ref: per-SLUG or null if not yet in master records
key_hire.new_role_type: enum: founder | co_founder | ceo | cto | coo | cfo | vp | board | advisor
key_hire.domain_expertise_signals: array of strings — what the hire signals about company direction

key_departure.departure_reason: ONE OF: resigned | fired | retired | acquisition | unknown

partnership.partnership_type: ONE OF: technology | commercial | manufacturing | research | government | nato_programme
partnership.announced_jointly: boolean — true if both companies issued statements

product_launch.product_type: string — e.g. drone, software platform, sensor system
product_launch.key_capability: string — one sentence on what is new or significant

programme_entry.entry_type: ONE OF: accepted | cohort_member | consortium_partner | contract_winner | grant_recipient
programme_entry.cohort_name: string or null — e.g. DIANA Cohort 2

acquisition.acquisition_type: ONE OF: full | majority_stake | minority_stake | asset_purchase

rebranding.deduplication_note: IMPORTANT — agent must update aliases in master company record and flag any other records referencing old name

events.confidence_rationale: Company press release as primary source. Corroborated by 4+ independent tier-1 outlets. Minor variance in valuation figure due to FX conversion across sources.

payload.use_of_proceeds: Scale European operations, expand manufacturing, grow headcount toward 1000

events.confidence_rationale: Company social post as primary source — no formal press release found. Corroborated by tech.eu and PitchBook. Amount undisclosed — valuation range varies across sources due to GBP/EUR conversion.

payload.use_of_proceeds: Fund OVERMATCH — £400M five-year UK development programme for AI-driven defence technology

events.confidence_rationale: Company press release as primary source. Single source only — not yet corroborated by independent outlets. Score below promotion threshold of 0.75.

payload.partnership_scope: Joint venture to develop network of 75-100 satellites for European space-based defence capabilities
